_meta.notes: M3 science-domain finale dual-run fixture. Legacy deployed.bases values are chosen so parseBases's new-wire grouping branch (groupFlatDeployedEntries, index.tsx) reproduces this EXACT DOM from the flat science.deployed shape: powerAvailable/powerRequired zeroed (no EC numeric equivalent on the new wire, only the coarse powerState enum), progress/collecting derived straight from scienceCompletedPercentage, transmitted/stored derived from scienceValue x scienceTransmittedPercentage. See DeployedScience/dual-run.test.tsx for the matching stream-side emission.
